title: Wardenworld
description: Delve into the Deep Dark Dimension, a world of darkness and mystery.
body: This plugin introduces the Deep Dark Dimension, a new and challenging world for players to explore. This dimension features custom world generation, creating a unique and immersive environment. Discover new items like the Sculk Echo and Sculk Heart, and encounter new dangers. The plugin is configurable, allowing you to enable or disable the dimension and crafting recipes to suit your server.
